ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Active, On Hold, Completed) */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" INTEGER /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user account (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress update */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user updating the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the progress update was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the progress update was last updated */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated completion date based on current progress */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual completion date */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes about the progress update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_progress_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task involved in the history record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "previous_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the task before the change */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the task after the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was changed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history record was last updated */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes about the history record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task dependency */,
  "dependent_task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent task */,
  "dependent_on_task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task that must be completed first */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was last updated */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes about the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priority_levels" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority level */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the priority level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the priority level was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the priority level */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the priority level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_priority_levels_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_priority_levels_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
